type: verify implementation + runtime smoke test + measurement
title: Runtime smoke test broker with mock and pi providers and record latency/failure notes

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Verify runnable MVP behavior from the outside. Use mock provider first, then a bounded real pi provider smoke if pi is available and responsive.
goals: Run the Rust broker with mock provider and submit simple TypeScript and Markdown autocomplete requests.
Run the Rust broker with pi provider using strict timeout if practical; record whether pi returns at least one code and one markdown suggestion.
Record median and p95 latency for bounded repeated requests where feasible.
Document failure-mode notes without overstating quality.
non_goals: Do not require GUI editor automation if host environments are unavailable.
Do not run unbounded pi calls.
safety: Use strict deadlines for real pi calls.
Do not send sensitive file content to pi.
success_criteria: If real pi smoke cannot complete, include exact command, timeout, and observed failure.
If acceptance criteria are blocked, spawn concrete fix tasks.
